Title: Rooftop
Speaker: {operative.name}
Setting: Building rooftop, {location}, city noise far below
TextLines: No ops running. No comms traffic. The board is clean for the first time in weeks.
{operative.name} found you up here. Brought two cups of something that passes for coffee in {location}.
"You ever think about what happens after?" {operative.name} asks. Not fishing. Just asking.
The city hums. {operative.role:mirror} is down in the bullpen, probably reading the same blank board.
For a few minutes, nobody needs anything from you.

Choices.Label: "After? There's no after in this line of work."
"I think about it more than I should."
